evals.prompt: Build me a landing page for a luxury watch brand
evals.expected_output: A distinctive landing page with refined typography, elegant color palette, and sophisticated layout - NOT using generic AI aesthetics. Includes press states on CTAs, fade-in animations, and a designed loading/empty experience.

evals.prompt: Create a React component for a music player
evals.expected_output: A functional music player component with a bold aesthetic choice (brutalist, retro-futuristic, or minimalist) and unique typography. Includes spring-based press states on play/next/prev buttons, cross-fade on play-pause icon swap, and a skeleton loading state.

evals.prompt: Design a portfolio website for a designer
evals.expected_output: A visually striking portfolio with unconventional layout, distinctive fonts, and memorable design elements that avoid cookie-cutter patterns. Includes staggered fade-in animations for project cards and a polished empty state for the projects section.

evals.prompt: Make me a simple CSS button
evals.expected_output: A creative button with intentional styling - NOT a generic bootstrap-style button. Should show character through hover effects, typography, or visual details. Must include a spring-based press state (scale down on active, bounce back).

evals.prompt: Build a React Native settings screen with premium feel
evals.expected_output: A settings screen with toggle items, a header, and list rows. Must include press-state scale feedback on each row, haptic-aware interaction patterns, keyboard-aware behavior for any text inputs, and a branded empty state for disabled/unavailable sections.

evals.prompt: Create a sign-in screen with keyboard handling
evals.expected_output: A sign-in form with email and password fields. Must include press states on the submit button, keyboard-avoiding behavior so the CTA is never obscured, gesture-based keyboard dismissal, and a loading state with shimmer on the submit button during authentication.
Should NOT trigger this skill. This is backend work without UI design needs.
